name: Portarium Governance
description: Routes all tool calls through Portarium policy, approvals, and evidence before execution. Blocks, approves, or queues human approval for every tool call.

portariumUrl.description: Base URL of the Portarium control plane, e.g. http://localhost:8080

workspaceId.description: Portarium workspace ID to govern tool calls within

bearerToken.description: Bearer token for authenticating with the Portarium control plane

failClosed.description: When true, block all tool calls if Portarium is unreachable (default: true)

approvalTimeoutMs.description: Max time to wait for human approval in milliseconds (default: 86400000 = 24h)

pollIntervalMs.description: How often to poll for approval decisions in milliseconds (default: 3000)

bypassToolNames.description: Tool names to bypass governance (use sparingly, for internal Portarium tools only)

defaultPolicyIds.description: Policy IDs to evaluate all proposals against (default: ['default-governance'])

defaultExecutionTier.description: Default execution tier for tool proposals when not overridden (default: HumanApprove)
